policies-privacy-policy.desc: Understand Moneyhub's privacy and cookie policy to protect your data and ensure a safe online experience.

articles-pensions-blue-monday.desc: Learn about the tools L&G have implemented, and their impacts, to contribute meaningful pensions support on Blue Monday

articles-risky-business-targeted-support.title: Targeted Support: risky business

articles-activating-29-million-current-a.desc: Discover how Moneyhub is working with Paragon Bank's Spring Savings to drive automated payment sweeping and Open Finance innovation.

articles-reasons-for-false-positives-ban.desc: Three factors usually drive false positives: static rules applied to dynamic behaviour, overly sensitive tuning, incomplete or siloed data

articles-is-your-banking-app-speaking-in.desc: Cryptic transaction data is costing banks millions in support calls, false disputes and lost trust. Discover how smarter transaction enrichment can reduce fraud panic and power better AI-driven banking experiences.

articles-rental-rewards.desc: Rental rewards are now available, with Londoners able to access local discounts through Brick Rewards when they pay rent.

articles-batch-processing-payment-fraud.title: Why batch processed transaction enrichment is the silent enabler of modern payment fraud
articles-batch-processing-payment-fraud.desc: Modern fraudsters now move faster than batch processing enrichment systems were designed to handle.

case-studies-financial-inclusion-simplif.title: Financial Inclusion: Simplifying access to VOXI’s discounted phone tariff with Open Banking powered Eligibility Checking
case-studies-financial-inclusion-simplif.desc: Learn how VOXI for Now uses Open Banking to streamline eligibility for its UK social tariff. Automated checks mean faster access to discounted phone plans for those in need.

case-studies-nationwide-deploys-real-tim.title: Nationwide deploys real-time savings account funding through pay by bank

glossary-consumer-duty.title: What is Consumer Duty?
glossary-consumer-duty.desc: Consumer Duty requires good customer outcomes. Firms should check product suitability, communicate clearly and offer reasonable support.

glossary-nudges-in-financial-services.title: How to apply nudge theory in financial services
glossary-nudges-in-financial-services.desc: When we move from static, batch alerts to real-time, hyper-personalised nudges, engagement metrics in financial apps shift dramatically.

glossary-merchant-identification.title: Why is merchant identification important in categorisation and enrichment?
glossary-merchant-identification.desc: Merchant identification is an important part of categorisation and enrichment, but only if labels are accurate.

press-releases-one-size-fits-all-finance.title: One-size-fits-all finance is over: Moneyhub enables financial institutions to get personal

New 'Build for Real Life' brand identity reflects company's enterprise transformation.

press-releases-wps-advisory-partners-wit.desc: Moneyhub partners with WPS Advisory to launch LifeStage, an innovative financial wellbeing app that uses Open Finance technology to help employees understand their complete financial picture and make informed decisions.

press-releases-paragon-bank-launches-spr.desc: Paragon Bank partners with Moneyhub to launch Spring savings app using Open Banking technology for seamless account integration, automated payments and frictionless transfers, transforming how UK consumers manage savings.

press-releases-moneyhub-appoints-anne-de.desc: Moneyhub appoints experienced technology executive Anne de Kerckhove as Chair of the Board, bringing her 20+ years of scaling expertise to the data and payments platform during a period of significant growth.

press-releases-moneyhub-to-provide-open-.title: Moneyhub to provide Open Banking solutions to UK government
press-releases-moneyhub-to-provide-open-.desc: Moneyhub joins Crown Commercial Service's Open Banking Dynamic Purchasing System framework, enabling UK government organisations to access leading Open Banking and payment solutions. The partnership aims to help public sector services increase efficiency and deliver better value for taxpayers.
